title: anthyllis vulneraria var. illyrica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. illyrica, also known as Mountain Tea or Illyrian Kidney Vetch, is a subspecies of the anthyllis vulneraria plant, a flowering legume native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Mountain Tea include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Mountain Tea include tea infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for various health conditions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
